items.title: Unauthenticated File Upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in the Amasty Order Attributes extension allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Critical PHP Object Injection in Mirasvit Cache Warmer for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer (CVSS 9.8) allows remote code execution via a crafted CacheWarmer cookie. This critical flaw has been actively exploited in the wild.

items.title: Security Update for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This security update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source, including issues that could lead to arbitrary code execution, arbitrary file system write, application denial-of-service, and security feature bypass.

items.title: Incorrect Authorization Vulnerability in Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Part of APSB26-49, CVE-2026-34646 is an Incorrect Authorization vulnerability (CVSS 7.5) that allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to bypass security checks and gain unauthorized write access to the affected application.

items.title: Unrestricted File Upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce REST API
items.summary: Sansec discovered PolyShell, a critical flaw in Magento's REST API that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files by disguising code as an image. This vulnerability has been observed in active attacks against a significant percentage of stores.

items.title: Security Update for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This security update addresses critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source, which could lead to security feature bypass, application denial-of-service, privilege escalation, arbitrary code execution, and arbitrary file system read.

items.title: Privilege Escalation Vulnerability in Adobe Commerce
items.summary: As part of APSB26-05, CVE-2026-21284 is a high-severity privilege escalation vulnerability that could allow an attacker to gain elevated privileges within Adobe Commerce.

items.title: Privilege Escalation Vulnerability in Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Included in APSB26-05, CVE-2026-21311 is a high-severity privilege escalation vulnerability affecting Adobe Commerce.

items.title: Privilege Escalation Vulnerability in Adobe Commerce
items.summary: CVE-2026-21309, addressed in APSB26-05, is a high-severity privilege escalation vulnerability in Adobe Commerce.

items.title: Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability in Adobe Commerce
items.summary: A high-severity security feature bypass vulnerability (CVE-2026-21289) was addressed in Adobe Commerce as part of APSB26-05, which could allow attackers to circumvent security mechanisms.
